What open-source LLMs run well on consumer GPUs? 🖥️

Several open-source models run well on consumer hardware:

  • Llama 3.2 (1B / 3B) — Meta's compact models, great for 8GB VRAM
  • Mistral 7B / Mixtral 8×7B — strong reasoning at 7B scale
  • Phi-3 Mini — Microsoft's efficient 3.8B model
  • Gemma 2 (2B / 9B) — Google's open models with strong benchmarks

For 4GB VRAM, use Q4 quantization via llama.cpp or Ollama.

ollama run llama3.2:3b
Which one is best for coding tasks?

For coding on consumer hardware, top picks are:

  1. DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite (16B, MoE) — best code quality in class
  2. Qwen2.5-Coder-7B — excellent for 8GB cards
  3. CodeLlama-7B — Meta's dedicated code model, wide format support

Benchmark tip: check HumanEval and MBPP scores when comparing.
